text.title: Model Context Protocol — Architecture and Core Primitives — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `mcp-architecture`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: name-primitives
step.action: Classify each feature as Tool / Resource / Prompt.

step.name: pick-transport
step.action: Walk tree; pick stdio / http_sse / streamable_http.

step.name: version-protocol
step.action: Pin protocol_version date; document upgrade plan.
